creator: list1@gjunka.com
text: This looks like a duplicate of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=204454 (since 204454 was opened earlier). Also, similar issues were reported in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=186352 and https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=211202 - can someone please add these to the See Also section?
